password.title: Password
password.text: Change your password to keep your account secure.

two_step_verification.title: 2-Step Verification
two_step_verification.text: Use additional verification code when logging in.

2_factor.title: Security Setup
2_factor.paragraph_header: Secure your account with an additional layer of protection. Scan the code to connect your identity with the app's 2FAS Auth.

step1.text3: (or your preferred authentication) on your mobile device.

verify_2_factor.title: Enter Verification Code
verify_2_factor.paragraph: We have sent a 6 digit code to your registered device. Please enter below to resume your identity.

security_alert.title: Security Updates
security_alert.text: Receive notifications when there is suspicious activity, new logins, or account security changes.

email_update.title: Email Updates
email_update.text: Get email updates about your account and important activity.

recipe_update.title: Recipes Updates
recipe_update.text: Receive notifications when your favorite recipes or recipes you follow get updates.

activity_summary.title: Activity Summary
activity_summary.text: View a summary of account activity, including recipes, favorites, and recent interactions.

theme.title: Theme
theme.paragraph: This will only change the theme of this website, it will not affect your browser's default theme settings.

language.title: Language
language.paragraph: This will change the language for this website only; it will not affect your browser's default language settings.
